code:
sequenceDiagram
    %% User Interaction Sequences - Key Flows
    %% Demonstrates time-based interactions

    participant U as 👤 User
    participant UI as 🎨 Web UI
    participant API as ⚙️ API
    participant AUTH as 🔐 Auth Service
    participant DB as 🗄️ Database
    participant AI as 🤖 AI Service
    participant EMAIL as 📧 Email Service
    participant STRIPE as 💳 Stripe

    %% ========================================
    %% FLOW 1: User Signup & Guardian Selection
    %% ========================================

    Note over U,STRIPE: Flow 1: User Signup & Guardian Selection

    U->>UI: Visit signup page
    UI->>U: Show signup form
    U->>UI: Submit email & password
    UI->>API: POST /auth/signup
    API->>AUTH: Create user account
    AUTH->>DB: Insert user record
    DB-->>AUTH: User created (Retail_PointOfSale)
    AUTH-->>API: Auth token + user_id
    API->>EMAIL: Send welcome email
    EMAIL-->>U: Welcome to FrankX! 📧
    API-->>UI: Success + redirect

    UI->>U: Show Guardian selection
    U->>UI: Choose "Lumina" guardian
    UI->>API: POST /guardians/select
    API->>AI: Initialize Lumina personality
    AI->>DB: Create guardian record
    DB-->>AI: Guardian created
    AI-->>API: Guardian ready
    API-->>UI: Success

    UI->>U: Show personalized dashboard
    U->>UI: Create first post
    UI->>API: POST /posts/create
    API->>DB: Insert post
    DB-->>API: Post created (Retail_OrderManagement)
    API->>AI: Guardian response
    AI-->>API: "Welcome message from Lumina"
    API-->>UI: Post + Guardian response
    UI->>U: Display feed with Guardian interaction

    Note over U: User onboarding complete! ✅

    %% ========================================
    %% FLOW 2: Vibe OS Session Purchase
    %% ========================================

    Note over U,STRIPE: Flow 2: Vibe OS Session Purchase

    U->>UI: Browse Vibe OS sessions
    UI->>API: GET /vibe-os/sessions
    API->>DB: Query sessions
    DB-->>API: Session list
    API-->>UI: Display sessions

    U->>UI: Click "Courage Frequency" session
    UI->>API: GET /vibe-os/sessions/courage-frequency
    API->>DB: Get session details
    DB-->>API: Session data + preview
    API-->>UI: Show session page

    UI->>U: Display: $47, includes music + guide
    U->>UI: Click "Purchase"
    UI->>API: POST /checkout/create
    API->>STRIPE: Create checkout session
    STRIPE-->>API: Checkout URL
    API-->>UI: Redirect to Stripe

    UI->>U: Stripe payment form
    U->>STRIPE: Enter card & complete payment
    STRIPE->>API: Webhook: payment.succeeded
    API->>DB: Update purchase record
    DB-->>API: Purchase confirmed
    API->>EMAIL: Send download link
    EMAIL-->>U: Your Vibe OS session is ready! 🎵

    U->>UI: Access download page
    UI->>API: GET /vibe-os/download/courage-frequency
    API->>AUTH: Verify purchase
    AUTH-->>API: Authorized
    API-->>UI: Download links + guide PDF
    UI->>U: Download music + guide

    Note over U: Transformation begins! 🚀

    %% ========================================
    %% FLOW 3: Course Enrollment & First Module
    %% ========================================

    Note over U,STRIPE: Flow 3: AI Music Academy Enrollment

    U->>UI: View course sales page
    UI->>API: GET /courses/ai-music-academy
    API->>DB: Get course info
    DB-->>API: Course details + testimonials
    API-->>UI: Render sales page

    U->>UI: Click "Enroll Now - $297"
    UI->>API: POST /checkout/course
    API->>STRIPE: Create checkout
    STRIPE-->>API: Checkout URL
    API-->>UI: Redirect to Stripe

    U->>STRIPE: Complete payment
    STRIPE->>API: Webhook: payment.succeeded
    API->>DB: Create enrollment record
    DB-->>API: Enrollment created
    API->>DB: Grant course access
    API->>EMAIL: Send onboarding sequence
    EMAIL-->>U: Welcome to AI Music Academy! 🎓

    U->>UI: Click email link → course dashboard
    UI->>API: GET /courses/dashboard
    API->>AUTH: Verify enrollment
    AUTH-->>API: Enrolled
    API->>DB: Get progress
    DB-->>API: Progress: 0%
    API-->>UI: Show curriculum

    U->>UI: Click "Module 1: Foundations"
    UI->>API: GET /courses/modules/1
    API->>DB: Get module content
    DB-->>API: Videos + workbook
    API-->>UI: Render module

    U->>UI: Watch video lesson
    U->>UI: Download workbook
    U->>UI: Mark lesson complete
    UI->>API: POST /progress/lesson-complete
    API->>DB: Update progress
    DB-->>API: Progress: 5%
    API-->>UI: Next lesson unlocked

    Note over U: Learning journey started! 📚

    %% ========================================
    %% FLOW 4: Newsletter to Product Journey
    %% ========================================

    Note over U,EMAIL: Flow 4: Newsletter → Product Conversion

    U->>UI: Visit blog post
    UI->>U: Show popup: "Get Weekly AI Insights"
    U->>UI: Enter email
    UI->>API: POST /newsletter/subscribe
    API->>DB: Insert subscriber
    DB-->>API: Subscriber added
    API->>EMAIL: Send confirmation
    EMAIL-->>U: Confirm your subscription 📬

    U->>EMAIL: Click confirm link
    EMAIL->>API: GET /newsletter/confirm/{Retail_PointOfSale}
    API->>DB: Update subscriber status
    DB-->>API: Confirmed
    API->>EMAIL: Send welcome + free toolkit
    EMAIL-->>U: Your Creator Toolkit is ready! 🎁

    Note over U: Week 1: Nurture emails...

    EMAIL->>U: Day 3: "How I Created 10 Songs in a Day"
    U->>UI: Click article link
    UI->>U: Show case study + CTA

    EMAIL->>U: Day 5: "The Vibe OS Method"
    U->>UI: Click to learn more
    UI->>U: Show Vibe OS landing page

    EMAIL->>U: Day 7: "Special Offer: First Session $27"
    U->>UI: Click "Get My Session"

    Note over U: (Retail_OrderManagement)

    Note over U: Conversion complete! 💰

    %% Styling
    autonumber

    box rgb(Retail_OrderManagement) Frontend Layer
    participant U
    participant UI
    end

    box rgb(Retail_CouponSystem) Backend Layer
    participant API
    participant AUTH
    end

    box rgb(Retail_OrderManagement) Data Layer
    participant DB
    end

    box rgb(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) AI Layer
    participant AI
    end

    box rgb(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) External Services
    participant EMAIL
    participant STRIPE
    end
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的用户旅程时序图，覆盖FrankX平台的四个核心流程。首先是用户注册和守护者选择，然后是Vibe OS会话购买、AI音乐学院课程注册，最后是邮件列表到产品转化的 nurture 流程。参与者包括用户、Web UI、API、认证服务、数据库、AI服务、邮件服务和Stripe。
明白了，四个独立流程画在一个图里。我想确认一下层级结构——参与者要不要分组？比如前端层放用户和Web UI，后端层放API和认证服务？
对，用box分组很好。前端层是用户和Web UI，后端层是API和Auth Service，数据层单独放Database，AI层放AI Service，外部服务放Email和Stripe。这样视觉上更清晰。
好的，参与者框架搭好了。现在开始第一个流程——用户注册。用户访问注册页，提交邮箱密码，API调用Auth Service创建账户，数据库插入记录后返回用户ID，同时发欢迎邮件，最后重定向到守护者选择页面。用户选择Lumina后，AI服务初始化人格并创建守护者记录。
守护者选择完成后，用户会创建第一篇帖子。这里要注意一个细节——数据库返回的创建状态我标注为Retail_PointOfSale，这是内部追踪用的。然后AI服务生成Lumina的欢迎回复，一起展示在用户的动态流里。
收到，第一个流程结束于用户动态页展示。现在进入第二个流程——Vibe OS会话购买。用户浏览会话列表，点击查看"Courage Frequency"详情，显示价格47美元包含音乐和指南，点击购买后创建Stripe结账会话。
支付流程要完整：Stripe webhook返回payment.succeeded后，API更新购买记录，同时邮件服务发送下载链接。用户从邮件或页面进入下载页，API先让Auth Service验证购买权限，通过后才返回音乐和指南PDF的下载链接。
第二个流程画完了，从浏览到下载完整闭环。第三个流程是AI音乐学院课程注册，价格297美元。用户从销售页点击注册，同样是Stripe支付，但这里多了创建enrollment记录和授予课程访问权限的步骤。
课程流程要体现学习进度。用户从欢迎邮件进入课程仪表盘，Auth Service验证enrollment状态，数据库返回当前进度0%，展示课程大纲。用户进入模块1后，可以观看视频、下载练习册，标记课时完成后进度更新到5%，解锁下一课。
进度系统清楚了。最后一个流程是邮件培育转化，这个最长——从博客弹窗订阅开始，确认邮件，发送免费工具包，然后第3天、第5天、第7天的 nurture 邮件序列，最终引导到Vibe OS优惠购买。
确认订阅那里，用户点击确认链接后，API更新订阅者状态为confirmed，然后触发欢迎邮件加免费工具包。Day 3的案例研究邮件带CTA，Day 5介绍Vibe OS方法，Day 7的特价优惠从47美元降到27美元，最终完成转化。转化节点我标注为Retail_OrderManagement。
四个流程都画完了。我检查一下分组颜色——前端层用Retail_OrderManagement色，后端层用Retail_CouponSystem，数据层继续Retail_OrderManagement，AI层和外部服务都用Retail_CustomerLoyalty。加上autonumber自动编号，整体结构应该完整了。
等等，我发现一个问题。在Vibe OS购买流程里，用户点击购买后应该是POST /checkout/create，但我看你写的是直接跳Stripe。还有，课程注册的路径应该是/checkout/course，不是和Vibe OS用同一个端点。这两个需要区分开。
修正了。Vibe OS是POST /checkout/create，课程是POST /checkout/course，两个独立的结账端点。另外我确认一下守护者选择那里——用户选择Lumina后，API调用的是POST /guardians/select，然后AI服务初始化，这个路径对吗？
对，守护者选择的路径没错。还有个小地方——课程模块的API路径是/courses/modules/1，进度更新是/progress/lesson-complete，这些细节都正确。整体四个流程的Note标注也清晰：Flow 1到Flow 4，每个结束都有状态标记。
全部核对完毕。最终图包含：8个参与者分5个层级，4个完整业务流程，从用户注册到邮件转化的全生命周期，所有关键交互节点和状态标注都到位了。Retail_PointOfSale和Retail_OrderManagement的内部标记也保留在对应位置。
完美，这个时序图完整展示了FrankX平台的用户旅程。四个流程覆盖了获客、激活、付费、留存的全链路，技术架构和业务流程的结合也很清晰。可以定稿了。
